AU_ADVANCEDBSCHEMA.tempString: <entry key = "-1"> <entry key = 'dbo.[target1]'><sql name = 'dbo.[target1]' key = '' fkey = '' updateKey ='NAME' schemaName ='dbo' >SELECT NAME,SEX,AGE,CITY,FIRST,LAST,GENDER,SCHOOL,STATE,COUNTRY,LOCATION,MARRIED,ADDRESS,STATION,DATEOFBIRTH,HOSPITALNAME,HOBBIES FROM dbo.[target1]</sql> </entry> </entry>

<xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <query>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]SELECT NAME,SEX,AGE,CITY,FIRST,LAST,GENDER,SCHOOL,STATE,COUNTRY,LOCATION,MARRIED,ADDRESS,STATION,DATEOFBIRTH,HOSPITALNAME,HOBBIES
